case_title: REBECCA M. WALLACE VS. SHABAN SHAKOORI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $175. SERVED JUL-13-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, SHABAN
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SHAKOORI, SHABAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WALLACE, REBECCA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-09-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-14-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF REBECCA WALLACE & DEFENDANT SHABAN SHAKOORI. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE SLOAT, INC. AND THE SHAKOORI FAMILY TRUST. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF CROSS-DEFENDANT TO NOV-14-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT SHABAN SHAKOORI AND CROSS-DEFENDANT REBECCA M. WALLACE. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE OF THE CROSS-CLAIM ON REBECCA M. WALLACE WAS UNTIMELY, BUT SHE (MS. WALLACE) WAIVED SERVICE OF THE CROSS-CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. MATTER IS CONTINUED IN ORDER TO BE HEARD IN CONJUNCTION WITH REBECCA M. WALLACE'S CLAIM, WHICH SHE SHALL AMEND FORTHWITH TO INCLUDE ENTITY DEFENDANTS SLOAT, INC. AND THE SHAKOORI FAMILY TRUST. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE; DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPERANCES BY PLAINTIFF REBECCA M. WALLACE (VIA TELEPHONE) AND DEFENDANTS SHABAN SHAKOORI, SLOAN, INC. AND THE SHAKOORI FAMILY TRUST. MR. SHAKOORI IS APPEARING ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND THE TWO ENTITY DEFENDANTS. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT DISMISSES WITH PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS SHABAN SHAKOORI & THE SHAKOORI FAMILY TRUST, AS THEY ARE NOT PROPER PARTIES TO THIS ACTION. ADDITIONALLY, DEFENDANT SHABAN SHAKOORI'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM BOTH PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-09-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-14-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION RE: AMENDED CLAIM ADDING ADDITIONAL PARTIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, REBECCA M.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANTS SHABAN SHAKOORI AND THE SHAKOORI FAMILY TRUST BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-14-2016 AT 1:30 PM. NOT PROPER PARTIES TO THE ACTION. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR ON NOV-14-2016 IN DEPT. 506 - DEFENDANT SHABAN SHAKOORI'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY WALLACE, REBECCA M. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAKOORI, SHABAN SLOAT, INC. THE SHAKOORI FAMILY TRUST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALLACE, REBECCA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SLOAT, INC. $1,243.53 PRINCIPAL, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,573.53, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST SHABAN SHAKOORI AND THE SHAKOORI FAMILY TRUST ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - NOT PROPER PARTIES. DEFENDANT SHABAN SHAKOORI'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $793.78 (AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF) IN THE EVENT DEFENDANT'S CHECK #793 REMAINS PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
